items.author: Peter Steinberger
items.bio: Polyagentmorous ClawFather. Came back from retirement to mess with AI and help a lobster take over the world. @OpenClaw🦞 + @OpenAI
items.summary_en:
We can now reproduce issues directly in empheral crabboxes with WebVNC (Linux/Windows/macOS).

Agents set up the exact state to test + fix and post videos on the PR.

Working hard to level up our QA. https://t.co/SEj2XRpaD1 https://t.co/o4sfuHuY31
items.summary_zh: 他们把问题复现搬进带 WebVNC 的临时 crabboxes，Linux/Windows/macOS 都能跑；Agent 直接搭好现场、测试修复、把视频丢到 PR 里，QA 从口头描述变成可验尸的证据链。

items.author: Garry Tan
items.bio: President & CEO @ycombinator —Founder @garryslist—Creator of GStack & GBrain—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop
items.summary_en: Also I’m a psycho about testing https://t.co/nL37rPCOjI
items.summary_zh: 他补了一刀：自己在测试上就是个疯子，AI 产品不是演示能跑就算完，必须被测到经得起折腾。

items.author: Garry Tan
items.bio: President & CEO @ycombinator —Founder @garryslist—Creator of GStack & GBrain—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop
items.summary_en:
What makes gbrain genuinely different? 

It's not a memory layer OR a code tool OR a search engine. It's all three unified under one graph with one query interface. Nobody else has that.

And I use it all day with my 100k markdown file OpenClaw+Hermes Agent setup.
items.summary_zh: gbrain 真正不同的地方，不是它是记忆层、代码工具或搜索引擎，而是把三者统一到同一张图和同一个查询接口里；现在没人有这个。作者还说，他整天拿它跑自己那套 100k Markdown 文件的 OpenClaw+Hermes Agent 工作流。

items.author: Garry Tan
items.bio: President & CEO @ycombinator —Founder @garryslist—Creator of GStack & GBrain—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop
items.summary_en:
GBrain v0.27 just dropped - as promised, you asked for support for lots of other non-Anthropic and non-OpenAI embeddings and LLM support, so here it is. 

Multi-modal embeddings and deep photo OCR, description, and EXIF extraction coming shortly after that. https://t.co/wONjyvVGPR
items.summary_zh: GBrain v0.27 上线，终于把 Anthropic、OpenAI 之外的一堆 embedding 和 LLM 支持补上了：用户要的不是路线图，是现在能用。下一步是多模态 embedding、深度照片 OCR、图片描述和 EXIF 提取。

items.summary_zh: Replit 已经不只是帮人写代码，而是在帮创业者找投资人、约会议。AI builder 的战场正在从造产品，推进到融资和商业开发。

items.summary_en:
Coding is the first frontier.
Knowledge work is the second one.
Personal agents are the third.
items.summary_zh: AI 的第一战场是写代码，第二战场是知识工作，第三战场才是个人智能体。

items.summary_en:
Crabbox 0.5.0 is live 🦀

🖥️ Desktop/browser leases
🧑‍💻 VNC + authenticated WebVNC
🪟 AWS Windows + WSL2
📸 Screenshots + app launch

Remote CI boxes, now suspiciously usable.
https://t.co/4CmPYGC3qz
items.summary_zh: Crabbox 0.5.0 把远程 CI 盒子做成了能租桌面/浏览器、跑 VNC 和认证 WebVNC、用 AWS Windows + WSL2、还能截图和拉起应用的半成品工作站。原本冷冰冰的 CI 机器，现在已经“可疑地好用”了。

Maybe she can make her first dollar online too.

items.author: Swyx
items.bio: achieve ambition with intentionality, intensity, integrity & insanity.  affiliations: - @dxtipshq  - @cognition - @temporalio - @aidotengineer - @latentspacepod
items.summary_en:
OAI 850B valuation, ~30B ARR now 
Ant ~900B valuation, ~44B* ARR now  

*revenue recognized differently, per Denise Dresser its probably closer to 8-10B lower if using OAI methodology

chart reconstructed from wsj by me https://t.co/6NJhYWD7OR
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 估值 8500 亿美元、ARR 约 300 亿；Anthropic 估值约 9000 亿、ARR 约 440 亿，但按 OpenAI 的收入确认口径可能要砍掉 80-100 亿。看起来 Anthropic 更贵、更猛，实际口径一换，差距没那么干净。

items.author: Training Data
items.title: Waymo's Dmitri Dolgov: 20 Million Rides and the Road to Full Autonomy
items.summary_en:
Speaker 1 | 00:02 - 00:17
We have an unbelievable treat next. A founder who's touching a ton of lives and who's been at it for a very long time. How many people here have been in a Waymo? Okay. Well, that's a relief.

Speaker 1 | 00:17 - 00:20
The chef eats his own food.

Speaker 2 | 00:20 - 00:21
I do. I do a lot of it.

Speaker 1 | 00:21 - 00:29
Alright. And how many people love the Waymo experience? Rock on. I'm a daily active now. It's incredible.

Speaker 2 | 00:29 - 00:30
Excellent. Thank

Speaker 1 | 00:30 - 01:00
you. We have here the creator, a man who has been at this mission for, get this, founders who've been in AI since 2022, almost twenty years building in the autonomous vehicle challenge. And he has not only been at this, he's been at it in the great times, at the tough times, he's been persistent, and he has created something that is unlike anything else on earth. Truly exceptional. Please join me in welcoming Dmitry Dolgoff.

Speaker 2 | 01:04 - 01:05
Thanks. Great to be here.

Speaker 1 | 01:05 - 01:24
Alright, Dmitry. So we've got about twenty five minutes together. The goal is to understand a little bit about you, what makes you tick, what has made you persist since the early days of the DARPA challenge twenty one years ago, all the way through Waymo early days to today and the future. Let's start on you and then we'll get into technology very quickly. Sound good?

Speaker 2 | 01:24 - 01:25
Sounds good.

Speaker 1 | 01:25 - 01:49
Okay. So, Dmitry, you are known by your team as technically brilliant, incredibly intense, but also very kind and humble. You were born in The Soviet Union, raised in The States, and then chose to go back to one of the most prestigious, intense physics programs on the planet in Moscow. How did those first few years of your l
items.summary_zh: 当很多 AI 创业者 2022 年才入场，Dmitri Dolgov 已经在自动驾驶这条硬路上熬了近二十年，从 DARPA 挑战赛一路做到今天的 Waymo。主持人把他抬到一个很高的位置：技术极强、强度拉满，却还谦逊温和，做出了一个真正上路、被用户日常使用和喜欢的 AI 产品。

items.author: Guillermo Rauch
items.bio: @vercel CEO
items.summary_en:
𝚗𝚙𝚡 𝚍𝚎𝚎𝚙𝚜𝚎𝚌

We're introducing an open-source agent orchestrator for deep security reviews.

We built it for internal use, and after running it against some major OSS projects, we gained conviction to share it with the world.

Coding agents can now find critical vulnerabilities in minutes that would take teams of people months (if they can spot them at all). Since 𝚍𝚎𝚎𝚙𝚜𝚎𝚌 is optimized to work with Vercel Sandbox, you can effectively harness the power of thousands of agents scrutinizing your codebase in parallel.

I encourage you to try this on your repositories. BTW: If you run an OSS project and want us to sponsor a run, my DMs are open.
items.summary_zh: `npx deepsec` 是一个开源安全审查 Agent 编排器：把成千上万个 coding agents 并行扔进代码库，几分钟挖出团队几个月都未必能发现的高危漏洞。它原本是内部工具，跑过多个大型 OSS 项目后决定公开，开源项目还能找他们赞助一次扫描。

items.author: Matt Turck
items.bio: VC at @FirstMarkCap.  Host: MAD Podcast; Organizer: Data Driven NYC, Author: MAD Landscape.
items.summary_en:
VCs need to start following the literal description naming trend:

The Capital Deployment Company of San Francisco
The Check Writing Company of New York
The Bridge Round Partnership of Brooklyn
The Ghosting Company 
The Liquidated Preference Firm of Miami https://t.co/re4lweksYF
items.summary_zh: VC 也该跟上“公司名写实化”潮流：资本部署公司、支票写作公司、过桥轮合伙、幽灵消失公司、清算优先权事务所。把 VC 的体面包装撕掉后，本质就是撒钱、开票、搭桥、失联和优先拿钱。

items.author: Nikunj Kothari
items.bio: partner @fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire @meter, @opendoor, @atlassian & others. love @shimoleejhaveri + 👦👧
items.summary_en:
Apparently, this is a hot take..

Startup vintage of 2023-2025 is slowly realizing that fancy launch videos & focusing just on distribution MIGHT lead to VC funding, but still leads to money being lit on fire when you should have been spending equal (if not longer) time on retention.

Momentum (in lieu of anything else) has ceased to be a moat. It never was in the first place, and the numbers (seed -> series A gap) are starting to show this. We'll see acquihires at a much faster clip than we've seen before.
items.summary_zh:
2023-2025 这批创业公司正慢慢发现：炫酷发布视频和分发打法也许能骗来 VC 钱，但留存没做起来，本质还是在烧钱。

所谓 momentum 从来不是护城河，种子到 A 轮的断层已经开始算账，接下来会更快进入一波收购式招安。

items.author: Aaron Levie
items.bio: ceo @box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI
items.summary_en:
Both Anthropic and OpenAI have new initiatives to help enterprises deploy AI agents within their organizations. This is a trend that’s early but going to get very big fast.

As agents enter knowledge work beyond coding, there is very real work to upgrade IT systems, get agents the context they need, modernize the workflows to work with agents, figure out the human-agent relationship in the workflow, drive adoption and do change management, and much more. 

While AI models have an incredible amount of capability packed into them, there’s no shortcut to getting that intelligence applied to a business process in a stable way. This is creating tons of opportunities across the market for new jobs and firms, and the labs are equally recognizing the criticality here.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 和 OpenAI 同时下场帮企业部署 AI Agent，说明这件事还早，但会爆得很快。真正的硬活不是模型能力，而是把企业 IT、上下文、流程、人机协作、采用和变革管理全部重做一遍；没有捷径，机会也正在这里被炸开。

items.author: Nikunj Kothari
items.bio: partner @fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire @meter, @opendoor, @atlassian & others. love @shimoleejhaveri + 👦👧
items.summary_en:
It’s criminal how cheap and how good Gemini Flash is.. that too with 1M context windows and structured outputs. 

Probably, my most used model in production workloads. 

Separately their new live voice model is mindblowingly good if you haven’t tried it yet!
items.summary_zh: Gemini Flash 便宜到像犯罪，质量还强，1M 上下文和结构化输出让它成了生产环境里最常用的模型之一。Google 新的实时语音模型也好到离谱，没试过基本是在错过。
